title: Deleting Asset Properties
content:
You can learn more about [Asset Properties in the Overview ⟶ Concepts page](../../../../overview/concepts/variables/asset-properties.md). # Deleting Asset Properties To delete an Asset Property, you can use the `/properties/{property_name}/values/delete` API endpoint. You can only update an Asset property in the Kelvin UI or the Kelvin API.
=== "Kelvin UI" To delete a property, you can do this through editing the Asset. Full documentation on how to edit an Asset is in the [Platform Administration section under Asset Management](../../../../platform-administration/how-to/asset/update-asset.md). === "Kelvin SDK" You can not delete an Asset Property in the Kelvin SDK. === "Kelvin API" ```bash title="API cURL Example" linenums="1" curl -X "POST" \ "https:///api/v4/properties//values/delete>" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer " \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H 'accept: */*' \ -d '{ "resources": [ "krn:asset:", "krn:asset:" ] ```
summary: To delete an Asset Property, you can use the /properties/{property_name}/values/delete API endpoint.
